summary: Include period lengths in Dataset triangle cache filenames.
details: ArcRhoTri CSV caches now include Origin Length and Development Length in the filename, for example `Claim Counts--CWP@12@12.csv`, so different length selections keep separate cached data.
ArcRhoTri metadata sidecars keep the plain dataset JSON filename and no longer store Origin Length or Development Length inside the JSON.
Changing Dataset period lengths now uses the matching length-specific cache instead of forcing a clear-cache reload.
